notes: Patterns ported from the original Cashiro CIBEgyptParser.kt (parser-core/src/main/kotlin/com/ritesh/parser/core/bank/CIBEgyptParser.kt). Two formats: credit-card charges ("Your credit card ending with#8016 was charged for EGP 118.00 at SAOOD MARKET on 24/11/25 at 18:27") and refunds ("The transaction on your credit card#8016 from ORACLE IRELAND with EUR .93 ... has been refunded"). Deviations from the Kotlin parser (engine has no per-message currency extraction): CIB supports international transactions and the Kotlin parser extracts the per-message currency (EUR/USD); the manifest engine always reports the manifest currency (EGP). Amounts written without a leading zero ("EUR .93") parse as ".93" rather than BigDecimal-normalized "0.93".

fixtures.name: credit card charge (EGP)
fixtures.body: Your credit card ending with#8016 was charged for EGP 118.00 at SAOOD MARKET on 24/11/25  at 18:27. Card available limit is EGP  10000.21. For more details, please visit https://cib.eg/mb

fixtures.name: credit card refund (foreign currency, sub-unit amount)
fixtures.body: The transaction on your credit card#8016  from ORACLE IRELAND  with EUR .93 on 15/11/25  at 05:14 has been refunded. Please try again. Thank you

fixtures.name: large amount charge with thousands separator
fixtures.body: Your credit card ending with#1234 was charged for EGP 1,500.00 at CARREFOUR EGYPT on 10/12/25  at 14:30. Card available limit is EGP  25000.00. For more details, please visit https://cib.eg/mb

fixtures.name: USD charge
fixtures.body: Your credit card ending with#5678 was charged for USD 99.99 at AMAZON on 05/01/26  at 09:15. Card available limit is EGP  15000.50. For more details, please visit https://cib.eg/mb

fixtures.name: refund transaction (USD)
fixtures.body: The transaction on your credit card#9876  from NETFLIX  with USD 15.99 on 20/11/25  at 12:00 has been refunded. Please try again. Thank you

fixtures.name: OTP message is filter-rejected
fixtures.body: Your CIB OTP is 123456. Do not share this code with anyone. Valid for 5 minutes.

fixtures.body: CIB: Enjoy 10% cashback on all purchases this weekend! Terms and conditions apply.
